# Copilot instructions for treehouse-gen

## Repository overview
- This repository is currently minimal and is intended to host the `treehouse-gen` project.
- Keep changes focused and small.

## Coding expectations
- Follow existing project conventions and keep implementations simple.
- Avoid broad refactors unless explicitly requested.
- Update `README.md` when behavior or setup changes.

## Validation
- Run the smallest relevant checks for the files you changed.
- If standard project tooling is added later (for example `mix test` / `mix format --check-formatted`), use it before finalizing changes.

## Safety
- Do not introduce secrets or credentials.
- Prefer secure defaults for any new configuration or code.
